---
title: "debug_perf.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/debug/debug_perf.py"
loc: 44
complexity: 5
logic_score: 3.45
style_score: 3.82
intel_score: 6.85
overall_score: 5.36
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating PerformanceProfiler, execute.

## Interaction Protocol
Import PerformanceProfiler and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 21 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `PerformanceProfiler`
- `execute`
